column8: That's great, Cathy. Did you make that herself?
column9: Doug hit myself in the eye by mistake with his toothbrush!
column10: Cats can look after yourself, can't they?
column11: I hope you all enjoy himself on holiday!
column12: Dad didn't help me. I did it all themselves!
column13: We painted the room yourselves; we didn't pay anyone to do it.
column14: This kitchen isn't going to clean ourselves, you know!
column15: Wendy decided that she would buy itself a new dress in the sales.
